title: codereview-pass3: lichend forward_mesh_to_upstream must call process_dao for RPL DAOs from mesh before TUN forward
description: Without this, DAO table stays empty, is_local_mesh always false, no downward routes. Update RX path to parse for RPL type 155 and call gw.process_dao on the DAO payload per node.rs handle. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-6pbg
close_reason: Fixed as part of gateway rpl integration, SRH stub, tests/lint passes clean after 3 review passes
